Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Feb-23-2006 Text Ruling

Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Feb-23-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled Motion for Apportionment and for Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Crystal Howard, Esq. for Plaintiff: Charlene Wilson, ind and successor in Interest to Leona Wilson, Deceased; and Charlene Wilson, robert E. Wilson, Jimmy D. Wilson, Diana Lee rucker, as Legal Heires of Leon Wilson, Deceased.
No appearace by the Plaintiffs.
The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and considered the evidence, and declarations filed, Plaintiffs' Motion is granted, see scanned doc. for details .
